rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ROBERT R. PUCCINELLI
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Heirship And Approve Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. issues include: 1. the request to waive appearances GAL; 2. the request for the court to order the Puccinelli children are the sole children of the decedent based solely on the agreement, without any evidence put before the court; 3. negotiating and signing the agreement prior to appointment; and 4. the request to distribute to the GAL under CUTMA in the amount of $137,500 per minor, which exceeds the amount this court accepts (generally a probate guardianship is required for any amount in excess of $100,000, although occasionally it has accepted blocked accounts).
